title: stars / ghosts / aliens / cosmic-spiritual
body:
# stars / ghosts / aliens / cosmic-spiritual

The most cross-cutting motif in Colin's catalog. Stars, ghosts, aliens,
soul, dream-life, temple — Colin's spiritual/cosmic vocabulary appears in
every era from the earliest 2007/2008 archives through the CAVE RAVE 2014
peak.

## Tracks (selection — full sweep would surface 20+)

- `07_08 [_]/Starfish Breakfast.m4a`
- `07_08 [_]/SoulMusic (Futurist R-and-B)..m4a`
- `timesmileniceface spring_summer 08/05 ghost face stoned dork smile.m4a`
- `08092K10/09 alien 1.mp3`
- `08092K10/10 oh my stars.mp3`
- `08092K10/17 alien 2 blue.mp3`
- `M_A_Y_09[...]/12 maywolves hum and talk w_ shooting stars in the background.m4a`
- `MAY2011DTE/10 angel eyes DTE.mp3`
- `09 [_]/sun likes stars field day 3 leg race.m4a` _(sun + stars overlap)_
- `LIFEBEFORETIMESOUNDTRACK/05 sounnds 2_animal ghost bumps calls.mp3`
- `samplebooks/starfish mobiles.mp3`
- `underwaters/08 ballet starfish.mp3`
- `OCTOBRR2010/13 djtobyghost.mp3`
- `CAVE RAVE/07 sci fi moan stars.mp3`
- `BIEBER JERBOA/03 dream life inter missiles.mp3`
- `BIEBER JERBOA/07 (getting astounded by) blue whales on videos.mp3` _("astounded" reads cosmic-adjacent)_
- `BIEBER JERBOA/05 dem on ya, k pep.mp3` _("dem on" → demon)_
- `spooky sports/tennis ghost.mp3`
- `DDR2_HAUNTED/...` _(haunted is the framing of the entire mini-release)_

## Reading

Three overlapping vocabularies sit inside this motif:

1. **Stars / cosmic** — "shooting stars", "oh my stars", "starfish",
   "starfield" — wide-sky, distance, scale.
2. **Ghosts / haunting** — "ghost face", "ghost bumps", "djtobyghost",
   "tennis ghost", DDR2_HAUNTED — playful-spooky, slightly funny,
   kid-coded ("don't take it seriously, I'm a little kid" appears as a
   release title).
3. **Aliens / dreams / soul** — "alien 1", "alien 2 blue", "dream life",
   "soul music" — the *alien-safari-rainforest-style* self-description
   Colin gave Bandcamp Daily fits here.

These three vocabularies don't separate cleanly in Colin's titles —
"maywolves hum and talk with shooting stars in the background" stitches
ghost (talking wolves) + stars + sound into a single image. That's the
characteristic move of this motif: collapsing scientific, mythic, and
animal registers into one absurdist image.

## Notes for future passes

- This motif is the strongest candidate for a website "vocabulary tour"
  page — it's where Colin's voice is most distinctive and most consistently
  visible across his run.
- The DDR2_HAUNTED entry connects this motif to the **fragmentary class**
  (it's a singleton folder with one surviving track). Worth flagging that
  the lost DDR2 sessions almost certainly contained more cosmic/ghost
  material.
- Colin's own descriptor "alien safari rainforest style" sits at the
  intersection of this motif and the **animal-coinage** motif — the two
  may need to share a "see also" reference.
